name: @seed-forge/testing
description: In-process seed helpers for Vitest and Jest: seed a database via the core pipeline, not the CLI

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/vitest.ts src/jest.ts --dts --clean --format esm --external @jest/globals --external vitest
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/vitest.ts src/jest.ts --dts --watch --format esm --external @jest/globals --external vitest
